_meta.description: Menaion stichera coverage — which fixed-calendar dates have published OCA service texts
_meta.note: Keyed by calendar (month/day), not year. Gap = OCA returned 404 or parsing yielded nothing. Covered = at least one sticheron in DB from files.oca.org.
